description: Product Description 24 kids Super Hero tattoos Directions 1. Choose the design you like and cut it, then gently peel off the transparent film. 2. Put the design face down on the skin. 3. Wet it with water until it is completely soaked. (Hot water works better). 4. After pressing for 20-30 seconds, gently remove the backing paper and you will get a beautiful tattoo! To remove: Use Alcohol or Baby Oil to repeatedly rub the design. Safety Warning Not Suitable for children under 3 years old See more
